Hero.headline: a developer who turns rough ideas into
Hero.sub: Full-stack developer focused on AI and data engineering. I like the part where a sketch on paper becomes something people actually use.

About.title: a little about me
About.headline: I care about the
paragraphs: I am a 4th-year engineering student at ESIEA, majoring in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science.

Passionate about AI with a solid background in software development. I have built several projects that enabled me to independently design and implement complex software solutions, while strengthening my skills in AI, data analysis, and processing.

education.degree: Computer Engineering, Major in AI and Data Science
Bachelor's in Computer Science and Applications
education.description: Ranked 9th in the cohort in semester 5.

education.degree: State Engineer in Computer Science, Software Engineering
education.description: Ranked in the top 10 of the cohort during each of the 3 years.

experiences.description: Database administration - Internal network management - Team coordination - Project management.
Educational content creation - Visual identity - Post design - Account management.

Contact.title: open to opportunities
Contact.headline: Ready to engineer your next
Contact.description: I am actively seeking new opportunities to apply my expertise in software development, AI, and data engineering. Let's connect and discuss how I can bring value to your team and help drive your projects forward.
